name: integration_acquisition_i_built_a_forced_break_too
method: [ACQUISITION] I built a forced break tool for my own Tech Neck/Burnout. Is a screen lock-out too aggressive for you?

phases.name: scaffold
steps: Swap content layer: break-interval timer + screen-lock overlay component
Wire RevenueCat IAP (REVENUECAT_API_KEY) — free: 5-min interval only; premium: custom 1-60min, sounds, stats
Wire AdMob banner on free tier (ADMOB_APP_ID ca-app-pub-5277873663568466~6431629011)

phases.name: deploy_and_aso
steps: surge deploy PWA → breakguard.surge.sh (immediate, zero cost)
Firebase Hosting fallback for PWA offline mode
Generate ASO keyword set via subagent (App Store + Google Play)
Draft 3x PH tagline variants via subagent

phases.name: ios_submit
steps: xcodebuild archive + export IPA via ios_release_pipeline.py
Submit to App Store Connect (TestFlight first, review queue)
